THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTRA, MICHAEL DBA AVR GOLD D.I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, KARYNE IND. AND DBA VISUALLY SPEAKING PROD $3,271.50 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,366.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
